nasb.text: And the Lord hardened Pharaoh’s heart, and he did not listen to them, just as the Lord had spoken to Moses.

esv.text: But the Lord hardened the heart of Pharaoh, and he did not listen to them, as the Lord had spoken to Moses.

cnv.text: 耶和華使法老心裡剛硬，他就不肯聽摩西和亞倫的話，就像耶和華對摩西所說的。

ccb.text: 耶和华使法老的心刚硬，他就不听他们的话，正如耶和华对摩西说的。
